reasoning: Z.ai (Zhipu) has made rapid progress with releases like GLM-4.5 and GLM-4.6, but the available evidence suggests they are still catching up to or matching previous-generation frontier models (like Claude 3.5 Sonnet), rather than surpassing current state-of-the-art models from OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google. With the resolution date mere days away, there is no evidence that Z.ai is currently #1 on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard, and it is highly unlikely they will secure the top spot by October 31.
batch_queries: Will Z.ai have the best AI model on October 31?
